name: Higher uniformity of arithmetic functions in short intervals I. All intervals
title: Higher uniformity of arithmetic functions in short intervals I. All intervals
abstract: Establishes higher-uniformity estimates for the Möbius, von Mangoldt, and divisor functions on short intervals, including nilsequence correlations.
findings: Downloaded and bibliographically verified. The manifest’s former title was inaccurate; whether its short-interval uniformity estimates match the H15 phase is open.
